productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Button Flap Black Wallet
description: Crafted for the urban style maven, this wallet from lino perros is a must have for those who love organizing their wallet space. Dimensions : 9 cm X 19 cm Synthetic leather upper with mat weave design Foldable card holder space secured to the wallet with a buttoned flap Two pockets in the card holder space One main zippered compartment divided into two Fabric lining with floral print Branded zipper Care Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
